rationale: The citing paper explicitly extends its intrabrand search model to “limited awareness sets,” while the cited paper’s core contribution is a theoretical pricing model with “limited consideration sets” and demand/price mechanisms under constrained choice. This construct-level overlap in consumer consideration constraints and equilibrium pricing makes the cited work a plausible theory/mechanism source rather than an obviously incidental mention. Although only one DOI-level match is available (no in-text snippet), the pair is not safe to drop as mention-only.
